what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that points to a board item (board://item-95d4dcd3) in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML front matter and no body content.
It declares an attachment of type board_items targeting board://item-95d4dcd3.
It belongs to the dragnet-development channel and was added on 2026-06-23T06:30:09.649826+00:00.
standouts: Attachment target uses a board:// URI scheme.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References an external board item via a URI-style target.
concerns: The file contains no descriptive text or context about the board item's content.
The target URI is opaque without access to the referenced board item.
notes: This is a lightweight ledger stub linking a channel attachment to a board item.
questions: What content or discussion does board://item-95d4dcd3 represent?
Is the attachment type board_items meant to be pluralized consistently?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose (attachment metadata) matches the content: it records a reference to a board item and nothing more.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, file-based reference from a channel memory entry to a specific board item for later retrieval or fusion.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped attachment record that connects the dragnet-development channel to a board item without embedding the item's content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment file referencing board item board://item-95d4dcd3 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a link between a channel memory attachment and a board item.
